YESHUNGUANG-MEMORY.title: Memory
YESHUNGUANG-MEMORY.description: When in [gold]Enlightened Mind[/gold] state, this card will receive 1 [gold]Replay[/gold] and [gold]Exhaust[/gold].
YESHUNGUANG-PARTNER.title: Partner
YESHUNGUANG-PARTNER.description: When taking damage, a [gold]Partner[/gold] card will be drawn from the deck and added to the hand.
YESHUNGUANG-EVOLUTION.title: Derive
YESHUNGUANG-EVOLUTION.description: Based on the order in which this card is played in this round, different effects are obtained.
